[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A young person is shown in a close-up indoor selfie-style photo with another person partially visible on the left.

Main Subject:
The main subject is a young person with short, dark, slightly tousled hair, facing the camera with their mouth slightly open and looking forward. They wear a light-colored T-shirt with dark printed text across the chest and small dark marks near the collar area; their posture is upright and their face fills most of the center of the frame.

Setting:
The background appears indoors with a plain wall and a dark surface or equipment behind them. Lighting is even and bright from the right side of the image, creating mild highlights on the subject’s face and hair. Another person’s upper body is partially visible on the far left, wearing a dark top with light trim and visible white text and a star-like graphic, though the full details are unclear.

Visual Details:
The camera is close to the subject’s face, angled straight-on. The subject’s hair has a slightly messy texture. The T-shirt print on the chest is dark and blocky, with additional smaller dark elements near the lower part of the shirt. The background includes dark shapes and lighter wall areas, with the overall color palette dominated by light skin tones, dark hair, and light and dark clothing.

Visible Text:
“TE
FAMILY”

“在海岛喝汽水”
A “@” symbol appears before the Chinese text, but the rest of the handle text is unclear.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a close-up view of a young person speaking or mid-expression, looking at the camera. A second person is only partially visible to the left, and the background is a simple indoor setting with bright light from the right.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
